name: 在线教育开发实习生 Elearning Development Intern
short_description: An internship at an educational startup begins. No matter which computer is in front of you (inside or outside), you just need to, work and learn!
detailed_description:
New Game "Fortune Cookie" has released

New Game "Fortune Cookie" has released.

Welcome to play~


About the Game

Wait, I'm playing a game?

No, you are studying......

"Elearning Development Intern" is a very "casual" simulation game, you think you are about to do a front-end/back-end developer, and to the peak of life? No, you're joining an online education company in April to do content/service development, that's right! This is not a program job, it is about to do educational development . You will play as a educational developer intern and begin a three-month journey of hard working!

Turn on your computer, have a cup of coffee, and have fun working.

Do proofreading, answer math questions, make learning materials, label the questions in the question bank system, listen to the share lecture, attend weekly meetings and goof off.

Then on June 30, welcome your formal defense, and then welcome the ending of intern!

As for promotion and salary increase, have a better life...... wake up.

Plot Warning: For the day and week, you can probably guess what year it is.

Pain warning: This game may involve forcing you to revisit the beauty of junior high math.

About Me

Hello everyone, I'm Hao, an educator, lifelong learner and a game producer.

I'm working hard to make some serious game, and some educational games which could influence our life in the real world.

Well, I wish you all a happy study time ~

Oh, I mean, I wish you all a happy gaming time~
